    A

    About - Class in com.gomez.yourdownload.view
    Dialog window that displays information about the application, the developer, and the sources used.
    About(Frame, boolean) - Constructor for class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.About
    Creates a new instance of the About dialog.
    aplicarFiltroCombinado() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Applies combined text and format filters to the table view.
    applyCorporateStyles() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.PreferencesPanel
    Applies uniform colors, backgrounds, and custom UI properties to all components.
    applySearchingFilter(String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.SearchDialog
    Filters the resources list based on the user's input and updates the JList display.

    C

    com.gomez.yourdownload.model - package com.gomez.yourdownload.model
     
    com.gomez.yourdownload.service - package com.gomez.yourdownload.service
     
    com.gomez.yourdownload.view - package com.gomez.yourdownload.view
     

    D

    DownloadInfo - Class in com.gomez.yourdownload.model
    Model class representing a media resource within the application.
    DownloadInfo(Integer, String, Long, String) - Constructor for class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Constructs a DownloadInfo instance for a network-only resource.
    DownloadInfo(String, Date, Long, String) - Constructor for class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Constructs a DownloadInfo instance for a local file.
    DownloadInfoTableModel - Class in com.gomez.yourdownload.model
    Custom table model for displaying DownloadInfo objects in a JTable.
    DownloadInfoTableModel(List<DownloadInfo>) - Constructor for class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfoTableModel
    Constructs the table model with a specific list of downloads.
    DownloadService - Class in com.gomez.yourdownload.service
    Service class responsible for data persistence and system configuration.

    E

    escribirTexto(OutputStream, String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Writes a string to the provided output stream using UTF-8 encoding.

    G

    getAbsolutePath() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Returns the absolute path
    getBinariesPath() - Static method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.service.DownloadService
    Resolves the path to the yt-dlp executable.
    getBinariesPath() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Locates the yt-dlp executable path configured by the user or attempts to find it in common directories.
    getCleanFormat(String, String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Sanitizes and extracts the media format from MIME types or filenames.
    getColumnClass(int) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfoTableModel
    Defines the data type for each column.
    getColumnCount() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfoTableModel
     
    getColumnName(int) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfoTableModel
     
    getDownloadDate() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Returns the download date
    getFileName() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Returns the file name
    getFormatedSize() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Converts the raw byte size into a human-readable format (KB, MB, GB).
    getMimeType() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Returns the MIME type
    getNetworkId() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Returns the network ID
    getRowCount() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfoTableModel
     
    getSize() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Returns the size in bytes
    getValueAt(int, int) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfoTableModel
    Retrieves the value to be displayed at a specific cell.

    H

    handleNewFilesFound(NewMediaEvent) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Processes events triggered by the MediaPoller when new server files are discovered.
    handleTableDoubleClick() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Handles the double-click event on a table row to open or download media.

    I

    initComponentsManual() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.LoginPanel
    Manually initializes the UI components and layout settings.
    initFiltroComboBox() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Initializes the filter combo box with predefined media types.
    initMediaPoller(String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Instantiates and starts the MediaPoller listener to receive new file updates from the server.
    initSearching() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.SearchDialog
    Configures the document listener for the search field to provide real-time results.
    isInNetwork() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Returns if is in network
    isNetworkOnly() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Returns true
    isUploaded() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Returns true if it is uploaded

    L

    loadAllMediaInfo() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Synchronizes the local media list with the server's database.
    loadHistory() - Static method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.service.DownloadService
    Deserializes the download history from the local JSON file.
    loadRememberedEmail() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.LoginPanel
    Retrieves the remembered email address from user preferences if available.
    logErrorMain(String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Helper method to output major errors
    logger - Static variable in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.About
    Logger instance for event tracking in this dialog.
    logger - Static variable in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.SearchDialog
    Logger for tracking service-level events and errors.
    LoginPanel - Class in com.gomez.yourdownload.view
    Provides the login interface for the application.
    LoginPanel(JFrame, MediaPoller) - Constructor for class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.LoginPanel
    Constructs a new LoginPanel.
    loginSuccessful(String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Handler invoked when the user successfully authenticates.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    The main entry point of the application.
    MainScreen - Class in com.gomez.yourdownload.view
    Main application windows for YourDownload Manages the user interface for downloading media, configure quality settings and synchronizing with the server.
    MainScreen(String, MediaPoller) - Constructor for class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Constructs the main application screen.
    makeIconOnlyButton(JButton, String, String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Formats a standard JButton to render purely as a clickable icon with no background box.
    makeIconOnlyButton(JButton, String, String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Configures a JButton to display only an icon, removing text and borders.
    makeIconOnlyButton(JButton, String, String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.PreferencesPanel
    Helper method to transform a standard button into an icon-only interface element.
    MediaLibrary - Class in com.gomez.yourdownload.view
    Interface panel that manages the media library.
    MediaLibrary(MainScreen, JPanel, List<DownloadInfo>, MediaPoller) - Constructor for class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Constructs the Media Library panel.

    O

    obtainMimeSimple(String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Determines the file format extension for classification in the library.

    P

    performLogin() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.LoginPanel
    Executes the authentication logic in a background thread.
    PreferencesPanel - Class in com.gomez.yourdownload.view
    Configuration panel for application-wide settings.
    PreferencesPanel(JFrame, JPanel) - Constructor for class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.PreferencesPanel
    Constructs a new PreferencesPanel.

    R

    realizarUploadManual(File) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Executes a manual multipart/form-data upload to the API.

    S

    saveHistory(List<DownloadInfo>) - Static method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.service.DownloadService
    Serializes the list of media resources to a local JSON file.
    savePrefs(Preferences) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.PreferencesPanel
    Flushes the current preferences to ensure permanent storage in the system registry.
    SearchDialog - Class in com.gomez.yourdownload.view
    Dialog window for searching and managing downloaded media files.
    SearchDialog(Frame, List<DownloadInfo>) - Constructor for class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.SearchDialog
    Creates a new SearchDialog instance.
    setIsInNetwork(boolean) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Update the networkstatus
    setIsNetworkOnly(boolean) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Update the network only status
    setIsUploaded(boolean) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Updates the upload status
    setMimeType(String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Sets the mimeType
    setNetworkId(Integer) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Sets the networkID
    setPanelEnabled(JPanel, boolean) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Enables or disables all interactive components within a parent container.
    showLibrary() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Swaps the interface content pane from the main downloader view to the Media Library view.
    showLoginScreen() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Renders the login screen interface by clearing menu bars and replacing the content pane.

    T

    togglePolling() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Pauses or resumes the MediaPoller checking thread.
    toString() - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.model.DownloadInfo
    Provides a summary of the media resource.

    U

    updateIconState(boolean) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Swaps the visual status icon based on the poller's active state.
    updateProgressBar(String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Extracts progress percentages from yt-dlp console output and updates the UI progress bar.

    W

    writeLog(String, String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
    Writes formatted error details to a local project text file for debugging.
    writeLog(String, String) - Method in class com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MediaLibrary
    Appends a new entry to the application's error log file.
